body: scripts/e2e-provider-routing.sh written (UC-10, 11 steps, 244c7d8). Creates 2 provider connections (openai_compat + ollama adapter types). Lists connections. Creates provider pool, adds both connections. Creates route policy via POST /v1/providers/policies. Creates provider binding (project → connection + model). Verifies GET /v1/providers/health. Records manual health-check results via POST /v1/providers/:id/health-check. Sets+gets health schedule via POST/GET /v1/providers/connections/:id/health-schedule. Checks binding cost-stats, lists pools and bindings. 409s treated as idempotent success.
